Aurora Siam Holdings PCL — Thailand PDPA Data Processing Addendum Schedule and Privacy Transfer Memo (SEC/SET context)
Scope: Applies to Thai-listed Aurora Siam and its processors for investor relations, group financing support, and employment onboarding; excludes handling of MNPI.
Data categories: employee onboarding fields, vendor due diligence files, IR mailing lists; government-issued identifiers are not requested in these forms; collection is limited to necessity per minimisation policy.
Roles: Aurora Siam Holdings PCL is the Data Controller; processors include Nakhon Data Services Co., Ltd. (TH) and BayLink Analytics Pte. Ltd. (SG); no sub-processing without prior written notice.
Cross-border transfer approval: On 2026-03-12, a limited transfer of IR role contacts to BayLink Analytics Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) was approved under PDPA Section 28 with transfer impact assessment and ASEAN SCCs executed.
Note: No payroll or HR medical data is transferred outside Thailand; recruitment records are hosted in-country.
Consent: Marketing communications rely on consent; withdrawal may be requested via privacy@aurorasiam.example or the self-service portal; no active consent withdrawals are pending.
DSAR and erasure: DSAR-TH-2026-004 for erasure of a former contractor profile was fulfilled on 2026-05-01; an audit trail is retained for SEC recordkeeping and does not include salary details.
Retention: IR mailing list entries are retained for 3 years from last contact; financing records and SET disclosures are archived for 7 years per policy; earlier deletion occurs where not legally required.
Security controls: pseudonymisation for analytics, access on a need-to-know basis, encryption at rest and in transit; annual DPIA completed; no open incidents.
Disclosure and MNPI: This processing concerns publicly announced SET filings; no undisclosed price-sensitive data is ingested or shared under this DPA.
Data export log: Ticket REF-EXP-TH-SEC-0007 is closed; exports are logged by date, category, destination, and legal basis; no exports to high-risk jurisdictions.
Individual rights: Access, correction, portability, objection, and erasure are available; responses are provided within 30 days unless extended per PDPA; helpline: +66-0000-0000 (placeholder).
Miscellaneous: This schedule does not modify financing covenants; it evidences completed controls and does not signal a live breach or unapproved transfer.
